EXPLANATION: The paper exists at arXiv ID 2503.20752 with the title "Reason-RFT: Reinforcement Fine-Tuning for Visual Reasoning" (the v2 title), and the cited authors — Huajie Tan, Yuheng Ji, Xiaoshuai Hao, Minglan Lin, Pengwei Wang, Zhongyuan Wang, Shanghang Zhang — exactly match the real paper's authors.
